testcase.name: test_it_can_be_asked_to_blow_up_immediately_on_create

failure.message: ValueError: Value 5 is too large. Should be between 0 and 4

testcase.failure:
self = <venvs.tests.test_converge.TestConverge testMethod=test_it_can_be_asked_to_blow_up_immediately_on_create>
def test_it_can_be_asked_to_blow_up_immediately_on_create(self): self.filesystem.set_contents( self.locator.root.descendant("virtualenvs.toml"), """ [virtualenv.a] [virtualenv.b] [virtualenv.magicExplodingVirtualenvOnCreate] [virtualenv.c] """, )
with self.assertRaises(ZeroDivisionError): > self.run_cli(["converge", "--fail-fast"])
venvs/tests/test_converge.py:358: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ venvs/tests/utils.py:100: in run_cli result = runner.invoke( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/testing.py:408: in invoke return_value = cli.main(args=args or (), prog_name=prog_name, **extra) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venvs/tests/utils.py:142: in main real_main.main(*args, **kwargs) .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1078: in main rv = self.invoke(ctx) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1688: in invoke return _process_result(sub_ctx.command.invoke(sub_ctx)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1434: in invoke return ctx.invoke(self.callback, **ctx.params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:783: in invoke return __callback(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venvs/converge.py:67: in main for config, virtualenv in _loop( venvs/converge.py:129: in _loop handle_error(virtualenv=None, name=None) venvs/converge.py:127: in _loop progress.update(progress.value + 1) # Update progress ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def update( self, value: ValueT = None, force: bool = False, **kwargs: typing.Any ): "Updates the ProgressBar to a new value." if self.start_time is None: self.start()
if ( value is not None and value is not base.UnknownLength and isinstance(value, (int, float)) ): if self.max_value is base.UnknownLength: # Can't compare against unknown lengths so just update pass elif self.min_value > value: # type: ignore raise ValueError( f'Value {value} is too small. Should be ' f'between {self.min_value} and {self.max_value}', ) elif self.max_value < value: # type: ignore if self.max_error: > raise ValueError( f'Value {value} is too large. Should be between ' f'{self.min_value} and {self.max_value}', ) E ValueError: Value 5 is too large. Should be between 0 and 4
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/progressbar/bar.py:934: ValueError

testcase.name: test_it_can_be_asked_to_blow_up_immediately_on_install

failure.message: ValueError: Value 5 is too large. Should be between 0 and 4

testcase.failure:
self = <venvs.tests.test_converge.TestConverge testMethod=test_it_can_be_asked_to_blow_up_immediately_on_install>
def test_it_can_be_asked_to_blow_up_immediately_on_install(self): self.filesystem.set_contents( self.locator.root.descendant("virtualenvs.toml"), """ [virtualenv.a] [virtualenv.b] [virtualenv.magicExplodingVirtualenvOnInstall] [virtualenv.c] """, )
with self.assertRaises(ZeroDivisionError): > self.run_cli(["converge", "--fail-fast"])
venvs/tests/test_converge.py:308: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ venvs/tests/utils.py:100: in run_cli result = runner.invoke( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/testing.py:408: in invoke return_value = cli.main(args=args or (), prog_name=prog_name, **extra) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venvs/tests/utils.py:142: in main real_main.main(*args, **kwargs) .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1078: in main rv = self.invoke(ctx) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1688: in invoke return _process_result(sub_ctx.command.invoke(sub_ctx)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1434: in invoke return ctx.invoke(self.callback, **ctx.params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:783: in invoke return __callback(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venvs/converge.py:67: in main for config, virtualenv in _loop( venvs/converge.py:129: in _loop handle_error(virtualenv=None, name=None) venvs/converge.py:127: in _loop progress.update(progress.value + 1) # Update progress ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def update( self, value: ValueT = None, force: bool = False, **kwargs: typing.Any ): "Updates the ProgressBar to a new value." if self.start_time is None: self.start()
if ( value is not None and value is not base.UnknownLength and isinstance(value, (int, float)) ): if self.max_value is base.UnknownLength: # Can't compare against unknown lengths so just update pass elif self.min_value > value: # type: ignore raise ValueError( f'Value {value} is too small. Should be ' f'between {self.min_value} and {self.max_value}', ) elif self.max_value < value: # type: ignore if self.max_error: > raise ValueError( f'Value {value} is too large. Should be between ' f'{self.min_value} and {self.max_value}', ) E ValueError: Value 5 is too large. Should be between 0 and 4

testcase.name: test_it_converges_specified_virtualenvs

failure.message: ValueError: Value 4 is too large. Should be between 0 and 3

testcase.name: test_it_creates_missing_virtualenvs

failure.message: ValueError: Value 4 is too large. Should be between 0 and 3

testcase.name: test_it_does_not_blow_up_by_default_on_create

failure.message: ValueError: Value 5 is too large. Should be between 0 and 4

testcase.name: test_it_does_not_blow_up_by_default_on_install

failure.message: ValueError: Value 5 is too large. Should be between 0 and 4

testcase.name: test_it_runs_post_commands
testcase.failure:
self = <venvs.tests.test_converge.TestConverge testMethod=test_it_runs_post_commands>
def test_it_runs_post_commands(self): self.assertFalse(self.locator.for_name("a").exists_on(self.filesystem))
file = NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False) self.addCleanup(os.remove, file.name) mtime = os.path.getmtime(file.name) later = timedelta(minutes=10) new_mtime = datetime.fromtimestamp(mtime, tz=timezone.utc) + later
self.filesystem.set_contents( self.locator.root.descendant("virtualenvs.toml"), f""" [virtualenv.a] post-commands = [ ["true"], ["touch", "-t", "{new_mtime:%Y%m%d%H%M}", "{file.name}"], ] """, )
self.run_cli(["converge"])
self.assertTrue(self.locator.for_name("a").exists_on(self.filesystem)) > self.assertGreater(os.path.getmtime(file.name), mtime) E AssertionError: 1772683560.0 not greater than 1772697413.4206777
venvs/tests/test_converge.py:145: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_no_such_bundle
testcase.failure:
self = <venvs.tests.test_converge.TestConverge testMethod=test_no_such_bundle>
def test_no_such_bundle(self): self.assertFalse(self.locator.for_name("a").exists_on(self.filesystem))
self.filesystem.set_contents( self.locator.root.descendant("virtualenvs.toml"), """ [virtualenv.a] install = ["foo"] install-bundle = ["dev"] """, )
> self.run_cli(["converge"])
venvs/tests/test_converge.py:262: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ venvs/tests/utils.py:100: in run_cli result = runner.invoke( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/testing.py:408: in invoke return_value = cli.main(args=args or (), prog_name=prog_name, **extra) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venvs/tests/utils.py:142: in main real_main.main(*args, **kwargs) .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1078: in main rv = self.invoke(ctx) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1688: in invoke return _process_result(sub_ctx.command.invoke(sub_ctx)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:1434: in invoke return ctx.invoke(self.callback, **ctx.params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/click/core.py:783: in invoke return __callback(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venvs/converge.py:67: in main for config, virtualenv in _loop( venvs/converge.py:125: in _loop for venv_config in progress(iterable): # Updated to use progressbar2 .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/progressbar/bar.py:852: in __next__ value = next(self._iterable) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venvs/_config.py:125: in <genexpr> ConfiguredVirtualEnv.from_dict( venvs/_config.py:49: in from_dict bundle = bundles[bundle_name] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tomlkit/items.py:1505: in __getitem__ return cast(Item, self._value[key]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tomlkit/container.py:622: in __getitem__ item = self.item(key) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = {}, key = <Key dev>
def item(self, key: Key | str) -> Item: """Get an item for the given key.""" if not isinstance(key, Key): key = SingleKey(key)
idx = self._map.get(key) if idx is None: > raise NonExistentKey(key) E tomlkit.exceptions.NonExistentKey: 'Key "dev" does not exist.'
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tomlkit/container.py:464: NonExistentKey
